key_risks: A sudden reversal in technology and semiconductor momentum could negatively impact the portfolio.
Geopolitical risks or currency fluctuations could affect South Korean equities.
Broader market volatility following the recent FOMC meeting could lead to a risk-off environment.

portfolio.rationale: South Korea equities have shown strong recent momentum, up 14.92% over the last 7 days, and are well-positioned to benefit from global semiconductor demand.
Semiconductors continue to exhibit strong momentum, up 9.29% over the last 7 days, driven by AI and technology trends.
The momentum factor has performed well recently, capturing the ongoing strength in technology and growth sectors.

portfolio_rationale: This portfolio targets high-momentum areas of the market, specifically South Korean equities and semiconductors, which have shown significant recent strength. The momentum factor ETF provides diversified exposure to other trending areas.
rationale_summary: Allocating to high-momentum sectors and regions, particularly semiconductors and South Korea, to capture ongoing trends over the one-week horizon.
